message:
feat(journal): add external_journal_segment() for external device replay

Computes the JournalSegment for an external journal device from the
JBD2 superblock's first_log_block and max_len fields. The external
device layout is simpler than internal journals (no inode/extent
mapping — the journal occupies the entire device after the superblock).

This unblocks wiring external journal replay through the existing
replay_jbd2_segments infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
